title: megalastrum bolivianum
intro: Megalastrum bolivianum, also known as the Bolivian giant fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Ophioglossaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Megalastrum bolivianum is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
